column2:
Universal audience: This audience includes all people, spanning all backgrounds.  Everyday vehicle owners (largest segment).  Passenger car, SUV, and light truck owners. Represents the majority of revenue. Motivations: Safety (family vehicle), Reliability, Convenience (quick install, local store access). This is the “mass market” base — essentially any driver who needs replacement tires”,,,
Mid income households,”Mid-income:core economic segment. A large portion of customers are: Mid-to-upper income households (~$75k–$150k), Typically owns multiple vehicles and prefer rusted service vs cheapest option.  High emphasis on safety, expertise and brand trust.  This is the primary revenue generating segment”,,,
Suburban families,”Strong overlap with mid-income but behaviorally distinct..  Often owning SUVs/trucks. High focus on safety, longevity, service experience.”,,,
